scripts.android:sync: npm run build && cap sync android
scripts.android:apk:win: npm run android:sync && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleDebug
scripts.android:apk:unix: npm run android:sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.android:release:apk:win: npm run android:sync && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleRelease
scripts.android:release:apk:unix: npm run android:sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
scripts.android:release:aab:win: npm run android:sync && cd android && gradlew.bat bundleRelease
scripts.android:release:aab:unix: npm run android:sync && cd android && ./gradlew bundleRelease
scripts.android:release: npm run build && cap build android
